title: All About Me and My Family Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The people who live with you and love you.
choices: family
parent
friend
rounds.answer: family
rounds.explanation: family: The people who live with you and love you.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: An older person, or someone who has learned more.
choices: family
parent
senior
rounds.answer: senior
rounds.explanation: senior: An older person, or someone who has learned more.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Something you must do or take care of.
choices: parent
duty
family
rounds.answer: duty
rounds.explanation: duty: Something you must do or take care of.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: parent

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To act in a good and kind way.
rounds.answer: behave

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: How well your body and your mind feel.
rounds.answer: health

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: My family has my mum, my dad, my sister, and me.
My friend Selma and I play football after school.
My little brother is a junior in the school choir.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Being kind and listening to others.
Something you must do or take care of.
To act in a good and kind way.
To show someone great respect.
rounds.answer: To act in a good and kind way.
rounds.explanation: Please behave and listen well to your teacher.

choices: How well your body and your mind feel.
Something you must do or take care of.
The way someone acts.
To show someone great respect.
rounds.answer: The way someone acts.
rounds.explanation: His good behaviour made the whole class happy.

choices: Being kind and listening to others.
Being safe and not in danger.
How well your body and your mind feel.
Something you must do or take care of.
rounds.answer: Being kind and listening to others.
rounds.explanation: We show respect when we let other people talk.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: What does Hannah's family do together every night?
choices: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
The people who live with you and love you.
A mother or a father.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: In my family, there is ______, ______, and me.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: His good behaviour made the whole class happy.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We honour our parents by helping them at home.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We hold hands near the road for our safety.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'behave' mean in this unit?
choices: To act in a good and kind way.
The people who live with you and love you.
A mother or a father.
rounds.answer: To act in a good and kind way.
rounds.explanation: behave: To act in a good and kind way.

rounds.prompt: What does 'health' mean in this unit?
choices: The people who live with you and love you.
A mother or a father.
How well your body and your mind feel.
rounds.answer: How well your body and your mind feel.
rounds.explanation: health: How well your body and your mind feel.

rounds.prompt: What does 'parent' mean in this unit?
choices: A person you like and spend time with.
A mother or a father.
The people who live with you and love you.
rounds.answer: A mother or a father.
rounds.explanation: parent: A mother or a father.
